title: Number of Unique Subjects Taught by Each Teacher
titleCn: 每位教师所教授的科目种类的数量

testcases.input: Teacher table: +------------+------------+---------+ | teacher_id | subject_id | dept_id | +------------+------------+---------+ | 1 | 2 | 3 | | 1 | 2 | 4 | | 1 | 3 | 3 | | 2 | 1 | 1 | | 2 | 2 | 1 | | 2 | 3 | 1 | | 2 | 4 | 1 | +------------+------------+---------+ Output: +------------+-----+ | teacher_id | cnt | +------------+-----+ | 1 | 2 | | 2 | 4 | +------------+-----+ Explanation: Teacher 1: - They teach subject 2 in departments 3 and 4. - They teach subject 3 in department 3. Teacher 2: - They teach subject 1 in department 1. - They teach subject 2 in department 1. - They teach subject 3 in department 1. - They teach subject 4 in department 1.
